title: erigeron eatonii var. villosus
intro: Erigeron eatonii var. villosus, also known as a hairy fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erigeron eatonii var. villosus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
